name: pdf_extractor
description: Extracts all text content from a PDF file. Use this instead of writing your own PDF parser.

parameters.filepath: The path to the PDF file (relative to the workspace workdir, or absolute).
parameters.search_query: When summary mode is active, tell the summariser what information to extract from the PDF. Be specific.

returns: The full text content of the PDF file as a string, or a focused summary when summary mode is enabled.
